case_title: DULCE GONZALEZ VS. PICSEL TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, DULCE AS TO DEFENDANT PICSEL TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, DULCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICSEL TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $9,610.81 PRINCIPAL, $77.81 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,893.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
